result.summary: The page is mostly intact, but there is clear horizontal clipping on the right side: some top category tabs and several game cards are cut off at the viewport edge, making the layout feel broken on this screen size.

issues.description: The rightmost category tab in the navigation row is partially cut off, indicating horizontal overflow instead of fitting cleanly within the viewport.
issues.suggestion: Adjust the responsive spacing and card widths so the row fits the screen, or make the row properly scrollable with visible affordance.

issues.description: Several game tiles in the rightmost column are clipped off-screen, with titles and artwork cut in half.
issues.suggestion: Reduce the grid column width, add responsive breakpoints, or enable a horizontal/vertical layout that keeps all cards fully visible on this screen size.
